subject: flight times for Je
body:
all these airport are approved  for entrance into Israel.

Slovakia / Kosice to Israel 2+45 min.

Romania to Israel 2+20 min.
 
Paris to Athens 2+50 min.
Athens to Israel 1+45 min.

Azores to St. Thomas 6+50 min (-30 head  wind).
